name: Herb Ripper 4-Piece Titanium Grinder
summary: Surgical-grade titanium. The grinder that outlasts every vaporiser you'll ever own.
description: The Herb Ripper is over-engineered in the best way. Surgical-grade titanium construction, magnetic closure, precision-machined teeth, pollen catcher. Genuinely lifetime kit — your grandkids will be grinding with this.
